lemmas.body: (x : ℕ) → (ih : count n xs = count n (sort xs)) → (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) = if n = x then count n (sort xs) + 1 else count n (sort xs)
lemmas.conclusion: count n xs = count n (sort xs)
lemmas.statement: (xs : List ℕ) (x : ℕ) (ih : count n xs = count n (sort xs)) (h1 : (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) = if n = x then count n (sort xs) + 1 else count n (sort xs)) : count n xs = count n (sort xs)

lemmas.body: count n [] = count n (sort []) ∧ ((x : ℕ) → (ih : count n xs = count n (sort xs)) → (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) = if n = x then count n (sort xs) + 1 else count n (sort xs))
lemmas.conclusion: count n xs = count n (sort xs)
lemmas.statement: (xs : List ℕ) (h1 : count n [] = count n (sort []) ∧ ((x : ℕ) → (ih : count n xs = count n (sort xs)) → (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) = if n = x then count n (sort xs) + 1 else count n (sort xs))) : count n xs = count n (sort xs)
